I've been playing this game basically since day 1 and It's safe to say it's one of the worst gorilla tag slop games ever. First of all the people who play this game are like 4 to 8 years old who can't even walk on two feet yet. I remember one time I got banned for like a month because some 4 year old British kid called a mod on me, and the day after I was banned for no reason. If you want a good gtag slop game it's definitely not this one! Also I don't know why but the game hasn't got an update in 1½ years already, that's probably because the moderators of this game focus on banning the people who are not mods for their garbage dying game🫩.

reviews.review_title: ROBOT TAG PLAYERS READ THIS PLEASE
reviews.review_description: The game is currently being modded heavily and there are hackers in the game. The revamp is going to release very soon and the hackers should be gone. THE PEOPLE BANNING PEOPLE ARE NOT A PART OF THE ROBOT TAG STAFF TEAM but are hackers who modded the game and have given themselves the moderator items. If you get banned by the hammer it’s only a 2 hour ban. If you get banned by the ban gun (the giant fireball shot at you) it’s a 9 hour ban. If someone touches your head with no hammer in hand and bans you that’s the invis ban which is 9 hours. Please join the discord for more info https://discord.gg/robottag if the invite is invalid dm me on meta or message me on discord my username is kr0n1q
Played this for ages amazing game

reviews.review_title: Take this hell spawn off applab.
reviews.review_description:
Number 1. Stolen assets, the countless amount of stolen assets I've seen is immense. Ranging from scripts, models, sounds, background.. is unbelievable.

Number 2. Toxic Mods and community, all of ur moderators are little kids no older than 10. They kick everyone in sight for no reason. I feel like the creator doesn't give a crap about his community or what his mods do.

Number 3. Horror, pvp, testing. All terrible I feel like the owner let a 5yr old build all of that. It's awful. Also he put no effort into building well made maps and it's unbelievable.

Hand over ownership to me.

Number 4. Hand over ownership to me, hand over the game to me. Why? So I can actually build a good map and remake the game like capuchin. I won't use stolen assets I will personally make my own assets. Also all previous mods will be demoted and banned, and I will hire new mods.. mods that are 13+ and are mature.

Number 5. I will fix it. I will fix ur crappy game. I will fire all mods under the age of 13.


Do you agree with me?? Tap thumbs up if so.
